**Summary**: A major Cambrian-Ordovician sandstone unit.

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-mohammedfaiz|Mohammedfaiz, 2014]] characterized the siq_sandstone in both Al Ula and Tabuk areas.
